build.stdout:
rm	*.o lavaMD.out \
	./kernel/*.o \
	./util/num/*.o \
	./util/timer/*.o \
	./util/opencl/*.o \


gcc	  main.c \
		-c \
		-o main.o \
		-O3
gcc					./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.c \
									-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include \
									-I../util -DTIMING \
									-c \
									-o ./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.o \
									-O3
gcc			./util/num/num.c \
				-c \
				-o ./util/num/num.o \
				-O3
gcc				./util/timer/timer.c \
					-c \
					-o ./util/timer/timer.o \
					-O3
gcc				./util/opencl/opencl.c \
					-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include \
					-c \
					-o ./util/opencl/opencl.o \
					-O3
gcc	  -I../util -I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include ../util/timing.c \
		-c \
		-o timing.o \
		-O3
gcc	main.o \
		./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.o \
		./util/num/num.o \
		./util/timer/timer.o \
		./util/opencl/opencl.o \
		./timing.o \
		-lm \
		-L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/lib64 -lOpenCL \
		-o lavaMD.out
